memoryArtifacts.description:
Save to my tree
Effigies of John Epes and his wife Margaret. The original placque was placed on the floor marking their tombs. A brass plaque and and effigies are now mounted on the wall of the Church.

zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I是John Eps Ips和Margaret Eps Ips的兒子，於1480年4月出生在英國肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼。他於1479年與Lady Alice De Harley在英國英格蘭肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1526年1月15日在英國英格蘭肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I是John Eps Ips和Margaret Eps Ips的儿子，于1480年4月出生在英国肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼。他于1479年与Lady Alice De Harley在英国英格兰肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1526年1月15日在英国英格兰肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Eppes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Epps
meanings: English: from Middle English (h)apse, (h)aspe ‘aspen tree, white poplar’ (Old English æpse, æspe). Generally, this was a topographic name for someone who lived by an aspen tree or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Apps in Surrey, Apse Manor on the Isle of Wight, or The Asps in Warwickshire.

English: perhaps from the Middle English personal name Eppe, a possible survival of Old English Eoppa, or its female counterpart Eoppe (Latinized in post-Conquest records as Eppa), probably from a stem eorp- ‘red’. Alternatively, Eppe may derive from Old Norse Øpi, perhaps from the stem øp- found in the verb øpa ‘to cry out, shriek’.
American shortened form of   Van Epps  , a surname of Dutch origin.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I was born in April 1480, in Old Romney, Kent, England as the son of John Eps Ips and Margaret Eps Ips. He married Lady Alice De Harley in 1479, in Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 15 January 1526, in Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I est né en avril 1480, à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, fils de John Eps Ips et Margaret Eps Ips. Il a épousé Lady Alice De Harley en 1479, à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 15 janvier 1526, à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes Iは1480年4月にイギリスケントオルド ロムニーでJohn Eps IpsとMargaret Eps Ipsの息子として生まれた。1479年にイギリスイギリスケントオルド ロムニーでLady Alice De Harleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1526年1月15日にイギリスイギリスケントオルド ロムニーで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントオルド ロムニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I(은)는 1480년 4월 영국 켄트 드 롬니에서 John Eps Ips(와)과 Margaret Eps Ips의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 드 롬니에서 Lady Alice De Harley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1526년 1월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 드 롬니에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 드 롬니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I nasceu em abril de 1480, em Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra filho de John Eps Ips e Margaret Eps Ips. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice De Harley em 1479, em Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1526, em Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I родился апрель 1480 г. в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия. Его родителей звали John Eps Ips и Margaret Eps Ips. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice De Harley в 1479 г. в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 15 января 1526 г. в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Eppes I nació en abril de 1480, en Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra como hijo de John Eps Ips y Margaret Eps Ips. Se casó con Lady Alice De Harley en 1479, en Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 15 de enero de 1526, en Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
